Recompute at build/sign time (see docs/DEVELOPMENT_DESIGN.md §6) rather than trusting this note as authoritative once files change.

changelog.summary: Closed the D2 verification gap using a full crawl of code.claude.com/docs (168 pages, via llms.txt) supplied by the user. Corrected the memory-hierarchy model (files are concatenated, not overridden by specificity), added Auto memory and .claude/rules/ as first-class topics, corrected hook exit-code semantics (only exit 2 blocks, not any non-zero), corrected that custom slash commands have been merged into Skills (not a separate mechanism), and added a new lesson/question/glossary coverage for Routines. Re-affirmed D1 Lesson 2 (five workflow patterns) against a fresh fetch of the Anthropic engineering blog post — content was already accurate, no changes needed.
